weaknesses: No direct mention of AML/KYC or regulatory reporting

improvement_bullets: Integrated data from various sources including REST APIs and relational databases, building structured datasets that directly supported front-end feature development and reduced UI bugs, preparing for potential exposure to financial data systems.
Utilized SQL queries to validate and synchronize data across systems, improving data accuracy by 60%, with a focus on applications relevant to financial data integrity and regulatory compliance.

Cleaned and analyzed 100,000+ NYC arrest records using Python (Pandas, NumPy), identifying patterns across boroughs, demographics, and offense categories to produce actionable insights for crime prevention strategy, demonstrating experience with large-scale datasets and analysis relevant to risk assessment.

Built a production-grade ELT pipeline ingesting Federal Reserve economic data (GDP, CPI, Fed rate, S&P 500) from the FRED API into Google BigQuery using Python, Airflow, dbt, and GCS, showcasing experience with data pipelines and financial data.

Modeled raw API data into a dbt star schema reducing analyst query time via BigQuery partitioning and clustering, demonstrating proficiency in data modeling for efficient querying of large datasets, which can be applied to financial analytics.
cover_letter:
Justin Miller
October 26, 2023

Hiring Manager
AARATECH

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Data Engineer position at AARATECH. With my background in building robust data pipelines, leveraging cloud infrastructure, and ensuring data quality, I am confident I would be a strong addition to your team.

AARATECH's focus on delivering innovative solutions through data-driven insights and collaborative partnerships resonates strongly with my own professional ethos. I am particularly impressed by your commitment to improving operational efficiency across healthcare and enterprise domains.

In my previous roles, I have built and maintained production-grade ELT pipelines using Python, Airflow, and dbt, successfully ingesting and transforming large-scale datasets into Google BigQuery. Additionally, I have developed expertise in data modeling, specifically dimensional modeling with star schemas, and implemented data quality validation using Great Expectations, which directly aligns with your need for ETL/ELT solutions and ensuring data accuracy.

I am adept at working with SQL for complex queries and data validation, and have hands-on experience with cloud platforms like Google Cloud Platform (BigQuery, GCS) and AWS. While my resume highlights general industry experience, my project involving the FRED economic data pipeline demonstrates my ability to work with financial datasets and build solutions relevant to financial analytics and regulatory compliance.

I am particularly drawn to AARATECH's mission of enabling better outcomes through data-driven insights and believe my experience in cloud data engineering and pipeline development would allow me to contribute meaningfully from day one.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background aligns with your team's goals. Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,
Justin Miller
